text: Trump to Israel: Israel will not be bombing Lebanon any longer. They are prohibited by the U.S.A. Enough is enough.

⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 U.S. President Trump announced that the United States will take all nuclear “dust” created by US B‑2 bombers in Iran, with no money exchanging hands. He said the deal is not linked to Lebanon, but the U.S. will separately work with Lebanon to address Hezbollah. “Israel will not be bombing Lebanon any longer. They are PROHIBITED from doing so by the U.S.A. Enough is enough!!!” @wfwitness

Trump: The U.S.A. will get all Nuclear “Dust,” created by our great B2 Bombers. No money will exchange hands. This deal is not subject to Lebanon, but the USA will separately work with Lebanon and deal with the Hezbollah situation. Israel will not be bombing Lebanon any longer — they are prohibited by the U.S.A. Enough is enough.

Senior Iranian military official on the opening of Strait of Hormuz: Only non-military vessels can transit, through designated routes and with IRGC Navy approval. Civilian ships must follow routes set by Iran’s Ports and Maritime Organization. Source: IRIB

↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu stated that Israel has destroyed 90% of Hezbollah’s missile and rocket stockpile and that it's a shadow of what it once was: ​"Regarding the distant threat, we destroyed close to 90% of the missile and rocket…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu admitted that the fight against Hezbollah is not over: "But I say in all honesty: we have not finished the job yet. There are things we plan to do against the threat of the remaining rockets and against the drones threat—I will not elaborate—but we also have another goal, and that is the dismantling of Hezbollah." @wfwitness

Netanyahu on Lebanon: We achieved great accomplishments. We created for the first time a long security zone along the entire northern border. This strip completely removes the close threat of invasion. We destroyed nearly 90% of the missile and rocket stockpiles.” Hezbollah today is a shadow of itself. We haven’t finished the job yet. This will not be achieved tomorrow. It requires patience and continuous effort. We agreed to a temporary ceasefire in Lebanon. For the first time in 43 years, Israel and Lebanon are talking directly. We will give an opportunity for a diplomatic and military solution. The road to peace is still long, but we have begun it. Our one hand holds the weapon, our other hand is extended for peace.

text: Iranian military official says military vessels not allowed to pass Strait of Hormuz. Source: State TV
text_zh: 伊朗军事官员称军事船只不得通过霍尔木兹海峡。来源：国家电视台

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin addressed Israeli stating that they have eliminated the Hezbollah threat: "We had two threats from Lebanon: an imminent threat and a distant threat. The imminent threat was the infiltration of thousands of terrorists…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu stated that Israel has created a far stretching security zone in Lebanon: ​"For the first time, we have created a long security zone along the entire northern border—not just in Lebanon, not just here. At Rosh Hanikra, you see, this is the northern border; not just here, but along the entire Lebanese border to Mount Hermon, through the Golan Heights and down to the Yarmouk. They wanted to surround us with a ring of fire; we created a ring of security." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明向以色列人发表讲话，称他们已经消除了真主党的威胁：‘我们面临来自黎巴嫩的两个威胁：迫在眉睫的威胁和遥远的威胁。迫在眉睫的威胁是数千名恐怖分子的渗透……’” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，以色列已在黎巴嫩建立了一个延伸很远的缓冲区：“我们首次沿着整个北部边界建立了一个长长的缓冲区——不仅仅是在黎巴嫩，也不仅仅是在这里。在罗什哈尼克拉（Rosh Hanikra），你看，这是北部边界；不仅仅是在这里，而是沿着整个黎巴嫩边界一直到黑门山，穿过戈兰高地，向下延伸到雅尔穆克河。他们想用火圈包围我们；我们创造了一个安全圈。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin addressed Israeli stating that they have eliminated the Hezbollah threat: "We had two threats from Lebanon: an imminent threat and a distant threat. The imminent threat was the infiltration of thousands of terrorists into our territory and direct anti-tank fire at our communities. The distant threat, which Nasrallah built up over decades, was the firing of 150,000 missiles and rockets intended to destroy the cities of Israel. We have removed both of these threats." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明向以色列人发表讲话，称他们已经消除了真主党的威胁：“我们面临来自黎巴嫩的两个威胁：迫在眉睫的威胁和遥远的威胁。迫在眉睫的威胁是数千名恐怖分子渗透到我们的领土，并直接向我们的社区发射反坦克火力。遥远的威胁，即纳斯鲁拉几十年来建立的威胁，是发射15万枚旨在摧毁以色列城市的导弹和火箭弹。我们已经消除了这两个威胁。” @wfwitness

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ ❗️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Donald Trump: 🔹 “The war in Iran is going well. We can do whatever we want — everything is perfect. It should end fairly soon. text_zh: 特朗普：霍尔木兹海峡已完全开放，准备好进行商业活动和全面通行，但针对伊朗的海上封锁将继续全面实施并有效，直到我们与伊朗的交易100%完成！

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 "In line with the ceasefire in Lebanon, the passage for all commercial vessels through Strait of Hormuz is declared completely open for the remaining period of ceasefire." - Iranian FM Araghchi 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Trump is so happy he forgot the name of the strait 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 “根据黎巴嫩停火协议，所有商船通过霍尔木兹海峡的通道在停火剩余期间宣布完全开放。” - 伊朗外交部长阿拉格齐 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 特朗普太高兴了，以至于忘记了海峡的名字 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Strait of Iran is open — Trump
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 伊朗海峡是开放的 —— 特朗普

text: Oil prices drop after Iran announces the Strait of Hormuz is open.
text_zh: 伊朗宣布霍尔木兹海峡开放后，油价下跌。

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇷 🇱🇧 During the Lebanon ceasefire, commercial vessel passage through the Strait of Hormuz is fully open via Iran’s designated route. — Iran’s FM Araghchi" 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Oil prices continue to plummet after Iran's announcement of opening the Strait of Hormuz.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench 镜像：“🇮🇷 🇱🇧 在黎巴嫩停火期间，商业船只通过霍尔木兹海峡的航道已通过伊朗指定的路线完全开放。—— 伊朗外交部长阿拉格齐” 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 在伊朗宣布开放霍尔木兹海峡后，油价继续暴跌。

text: ↩️ Reply to Clash Report: "Trump: IRAN HAS JUST ANNOUNCED THAT THE STRAIT OF IRAN IS FULLY OPEN AND READY FOR FULL PASSAGE. THANK YOU!" Trump, for some reason, referred to the Strait of Hormuz as the “Strait of Iran.”
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Clash Report：“特朗普：伊朗刚刚宣布伊朗海峡已完全开放，并准备好全面通行。谢谢！” 特朗普出于某种原因将霍尔木兹海峡称为“伊朗海峡”。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷 Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says passage for all commercial vessels through the Strait of Hormuz is “completely open” for the remaining period of the ceasefire. He states vessels are to use the coordinated route already announced by Iran’s…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump thanked Iran for opening up the Strait of Hormuz to commercial traffic. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐表示，在停火期的剩余时间内，所有商业船只通过霍尔木兹海峡的通道是‘完全开放’的。他声明船只应使用伊朗已经宣布的协调路线……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普感谢伊朗向商业交通开放霍尔木兹海峡。@wfwitness

text: Trump: IRAN HAS JUST ANNOUNCED THAT THE STRAIT OF IRAN IS FULLY OPEN AND READY FOR FULL PASSAGE. THANK YOU!
text_zh: 特朗普：伊朗刚刚宣布伊朗海峡已完全开放，并准备好全面通行。谢谢！

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The USS Rafael Peralta directed a merchant vessel to return to an Iranian port as part of enforcement of the U.S. maritime blockade. CENTCOM reports 19 ships have now complied with orders to turn around since the operation began, with officials maintaining that no vessels have successfully evaded the blockade. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 作为执行美国海上封锁的一部分，拉斐尔·佩拉尔塔号驱逐舰指挥一艘商船返回伊朗港口。中央司令部报告称，自行动开始以来，已有19艘船只遵守了掉头命令，官员们坚称没有船只成功逃避封锁。@wfwitness
